title: Mint Crystal PvP Resourcepack
description: 🌿Spring green mint-themed 16x texturepack optimized for CrystalPvP.
body:
🟢 Mint PvP Pack | 16x | Tasty Sounds | Low Fire

Refresh your PvP experience with Mint PvP Pack, a sleek 16x resource pack made for Crystal PvP players who prefer a clean, modern aesthetic with smooth performance. Inspired by cool mint tones and soft green highlights, this pack brings a crisp and polished look while keeping gameplay sharp and responsive.

✨ Features

🟢 Mint-Themed Visuals
Cool green and mint accents give classic textures a fresh, minimalistic style that feels modern and easy on the eyes.

⚔️ Crystal PvP Focused
Optimized textures enhance clarity during fast-paced crystal fights, helping you react quickly and stay in control.

🚀 FPS Friendly
Lightweight 16x resolution ensures stable performance across all systems, perfect for competitive gameplay.

🔊 Clean Sound Design
Subtle and refined sound effects make combat feel smooth without being overwhelming.

🔥 Low Fire Included
Reduced fire overlay keeps your screen clear, so nothing blocks your vision during intense battles.
